title: 桜花賞の後に・至宝は未だ遠く

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Daiwa Scarlet fail to win the Oka
Sho, she crosses the finish line behind Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She throws herself into training so that she can
claim first place in the Japanese Oaks.
